diagrams.title: Shared Library Naming Convention
diagrams.description: Shows the three naming levels for shared libraries

diagrams.title: Library Search Order
diagrams.description: Hierarchy of where Linux looks for libraries at runtime
diagrams.purpose: Debug library loading issues and understand search precedence

diagrams.title: Static vs Shared Library Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of how each type works
elements: Memory: Single copy shared by multiple programs

diagrams.title: Dynamic Linking Process Flow
diagrams.description: Steps involved in loading a shared library at runtime
elements: Program starts → Dynamic linker (ld.so) reads executable → Finds required libraries → Loads libraries → Resolves symbols → Transfers control to program
